commands.review_summary:
The branch lets authorized native/text slash command turns bypass plugin-owned conversation binding dispatch while preserving plugin routing for normal and unauthorized bound text.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can return from the plugin-owned binding claim before downstream command handling runs, matching the linked source-repro issue. I did not execute a live channel repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: This open external PR needs contributor or maintainer real behavior proof before normal merge review can finish; there is no narrow code repair for automation to make.

target.title: Let plugin binding commands escape bound routes
target.body:
Fixes #85157.

## Summary

- Let authorized native command turns and authorized text slash commands with a parsed command name bypass plugin-owned conversation binding dispatch.
- Keep normal bound text, including unauthorized slash text, routed to the owning plugin as before.
- Add regression coverage for `/codex detach` escaping a plugin-owned binding before the plugin inbound claim can consume it.

## Root cause

Plugin-owned conversation bindings were targeted before the normal command resolver path. That meant a bound plugin session could claim `/codex detach` as ordinary inbound text, preventing OpenClaw's command handling from detaching the binding.

## Real behavior proof

Tested in a local OpenClaw checkout with the actual dispatch path:

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`
  - 1 file passed, 135 tests passed.
  - New proof case: an authorized Discord text slash `/codex detach` with a plugin-owned binding touched the binding record, skipped `runInboundClaimForPluginOutcome`, invoked the normal reply resolver, and delivered the resolver reply.
  - New guard case: unauthorized `/codex detach` still routed to the bound plugin and did not invoke the reply resolver.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/commands.test.ts`
  - 1 file passed, 104 tests passed.
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.ts src/auto-reply/reply/dispatch-from-config.test.ts`
  - All matched files use the correct format.

I also verified commit attribution before pushing:

`git log --format='%h %an <%ae> %s' upstream/main..HEAD`

Result:

`8ca88543bf Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com> Let binding commands escape plugin routes`

If maintainers squash or rework this PR, please preserve author attribution or include:

`Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>`
target.author: turbotheturtle
